title: Express 5 Resource Design, Middleware Order, Async Errors, and Cancellation
description: Routes mirror tables, middleware mutates unvalidated request objects, async failures fall through inconsistently, responses double-send, and disconnects do not cancel dependencies. Learners cumulatively produce layered Express 5 feed-reader API through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Design sources, subscriptions, entries, timelines, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions and method semantics.
Order authority, request identity, limits, authentication, negotiation, validation, authorization, handlers, not-found, and error middleware explicitly.
Use Express 5 Promise rejection flow while preventing double next, double send, partial response, and lost unknown causes.
